Kindly be advised that the following nationals cannot avail of expedite service:

Overview
Physical visa for Chinese nationals and other eligible applicants for business purposes.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Physical visa for Chinese nationals and other eligible applicants for business purposes.

## Visa Fees

[Conventional Visa - Single Entry - business Visit]

## Documents Required
Business Checklist

## Photo Specifications
PHOTOGRAPH SPECIFICATIONS FOR VISAS
- a passport-size photograph taken during the last six (6) months
- Photograph size is 35x45 mm

## Processing Time

[Conventional Visa - Single Entry - Business Visit]

[Conventional Visa - Single Entry - Business Visit]
Kindly be advised that the following nationals cannot avail of expedite service:

Algeria, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Lebanon, Libya, Pakistan, Palestine, Sudan, Syria, Yemen, Somalia, Nigeria, Sri Lanka, India, Timor Leste (subject to change), Azerbaijan, Bangladesh and Iran.
